arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Crystal Palace as Eddie Howe weighs up changes
arts.sum: Newcastle United squad vs Crystal Palace: Pope, Dubravka, Vlachodimos, Ruddy, Trippier, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall, Kelly, Targett, Guimaraes, Tonali, Longstaff, Joelinton, Willock, Barnes, Murphy, Almiron, Gordon, Osula, Wilson, Isak. Bruno Guimaraes and Joe Willock will have late fitness tests after both were forced off with injuries against West Ham. Both have travelled with the squad, however, and Howe is optimistic they will be involved today.

arts.ttl: Is Crystal Palace vs Newcastle United on TV, when is kick-off and how can I follow it?
arts.sum: Selhurst Park has not been a hugely happy hunting ground for Newcastle United as they prepare for today's Premier League clash with Crystal Palace. With Liverpool up next, this is a match Newcastle need to win to keep give their European hopes a boost and prove the West Ham result was just a blip.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United legend raises concerns over Eddie Howe tactical identity
arts.sum: "Newcastle struggled to break them down in the second half, West Ham played the way they wanted to play and got a fantastic win." Nolan has watched Newcastle closely this season and the former skipper feels that they may be better suited to playing on the counter attack.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe confirms he would ‘love’ to tie up deal for £2.3m-p/y defender after huge hint dropped
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has confirmed that Newcastle United are actively working to agree a new contract with defender Fabian Schar. Schar has been at St. James’ Park since joining from Deportivo La Coruna in the summer of 2018. £60m player told by Newcastle United he is free to leave! Since then, he’s made 200 appearances for […] The post Eddie Howe confirms he would ‘love’ to tie up deal for £2.3m-p/y defender after huge hint dropped appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner confirms Crystal Palace winger will spend season on loan with Sheffield United
arts.sum: Rak-Sakyi impressed over pre-season under Glasner – netting in games against Charlton and Crawley – but was loaned to Bramall Lane for the season with the Eagles failing to fill the attacking spots in their squad adequately. The former Charlton Athletic loanee has a recall clause included in his season-long stint with the Blades and has six goal contributions in 16 outings.

arts.ttl: Report: Palace narrowly edged out by Newcastle
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-21s fell to a narrow defeat against Newcastle United on a cold rainy evening at Whitley Park.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace handed double injury boost as Eberechi Eze returns to squad
arts.sum: Eagles face Newcastle ahead of big week for Oliver Glasner

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace injury news: Oliver Glasner issues Eberechi Eze, Eddie Nketiah update before Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner provides an injury update on Eberechi Eze and Eddie Nketiah ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Newcastle United at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: The key quotes from Glasner's pre-Newcastle press conference
arts.sum: Crystal Palace host Newcastle United at Selhurst Park on Saturday afternoon, looking to build on a solid performance against Aston Villa last weekend.
